title: Qwen_image_edit
description: Qwen_image_edit is a model that allows you to edit images using Qwen.

config._comment_gpu: Editor alone runs on 24GB. The planned pipeline keeps the Qwen3-VL planner + editor co-resident — prefer 48GB (L40S/A6000) for headroom. Larger tiers listed first so the planned path gets enough VRAM.
